sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tuni Honpa’n hong sam, “Hong pai in” ci.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tuni Honpa’n hong sam, Tu-in ngai in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tuni Honpa’n hong sam, Ama kiangah,
Nangmah na pai kei leh, sih

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kha Siangtho in hong sam, Amah nial ke’n,
